description: This scenario simulates a logic failure in a dynamic pricing engine caused by a timezone calculation drift. The system incorrectly calculates a future date (2026-03-30) due to an improper timestamp offset, leading to a KeyError when attempting to access a pricing table that only contains data up to the current date.

sealed_truth.bug_description: The get_market_reference_date method adds an incorrect offset of 82800 seconds (23 hours) to the current timestamp. This causes the generated date string to be '2026-03-30', which is a future date not present in the price_snapshot dictionary, resulting in a KeyError in calculate_dynamic_offer.
sealed_truth.expected_fix: Remove the excessive 82800-second offset in get_market_reference_date to ensure the date aligns with the current market calendar and available snapshot keys.
